name: Baked Potato Soup
recipeIngredient: 6 large baking potatoes, rinsed and pierced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Wrap the whole garlic bulb tightly in foil.
3. Place the wrapped garlic and potatoes in the oven.
4. Bake for 45 minutes or until the garlic is soft when squeezed.
5. Remove the garlic and let it cool.
6. Continue baking the potatoes until they are tender when pierced, about 15 minutes.
7. Unwrap the cooled garlic and squeeze the pulp into a 4-quart pot.
8. Peel 3 of the hot potatoes and add them to the garlic in the pot. Mash until nearly smooth.
9. Gradually stir in the chicken broth and pepper until blended.
10. Place over medium heat and cook until hot, stirring occasionally.
11. Meanwhile, cut the remaining potatoes (with skin) into 3/4-inch pieces.
12. Stir the pieces into the soup and cook until heated through.
13. Serve with some or all of the optional accompaniments.
